A '''message cube''' was a device which was essentially unsliceable, since the cube could be keyed to an individual's body chemistry, fingerprints, or even their voice. The cube could be hollow, used for delivering anything small in nature, such as physical media and datachips. It could even be built around a tiny [[Holoprojector/Legends|holoprojector]].

During the [[Corellian Crisis|First Corellian Insurrection]], [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] was delivered a message cube addressed to [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. The cube revealed the plans of the [[Sacorrian Triad]] and the [[Human League]], headed by Han's cousin [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]], to attack the New Republic.

{{Tech-stub}}
